module.name: iarrow
module.description: Inline arrow that flows WITHIN text (unlike @arrow, which is a centered block). Sized in em to match the surrounding text.
module.aiSpec: An INLINE arrow glyph that sits inside a line of text — use it for "leads to" between words, e.g. `入力 <!-- @iarrow --> 出力` or `A <!-- @iarrow shape: line --> B`. It inherits the text colour by default and is sized in `em` so it matches the font. This is different from `@arrow`, which renders as a large CENTERED block between paragraphs. Params: `direction` (8 compass points, default right), `shape` (triangle/chevron/line/double), `size` (em, default 1em), `color` (default currentColor = the text colour).

param.name: size
param.label: Size
param.desc: CSS size relative to text, e.g. 1em, 1.2em

param.name: color
param.label: Color
param.desc: Defaults to the surrounding text colour

snippet.label: Inline arrow (→)
snippet.description: A right-pointing arrow that flows within a line of text (input → output).
